---
title: "06 - Recovery and Quality Landscape"
author: "Analysis Pipeline"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 6)
```

# Q10: Recovery and Quality Landscape

**Question:** How do recovery and genome quality vary among Group4?

## Load Setup

```{r load_setup}
source("/media/Box/applesurface_management/00_Data_antigravity/scripts/00_setup.R")

OUT_DIR <- file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "06_quality")
if (!dir.exists(OUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUT_DIR)
```

---

# 1. MAG Quality

```{r mag_quality}
mag_stats_path <- file.path(DATA_DIR, "02_MAGs/taxonomy/mag_stats_summary_with_taxonomy.tsv")

if (file.exists(mag_stats_path)) {
  mag_stats <- fread(mag_stats_path)

  # Extract sample from MAG_ID
  mag_stats <- mag_stats %>%
    mutate(SampleID = gsub("_magscot_cleanbin_.*", "", MAG_ID)) %>%
    left_join(metadata, by = "SampleID")

  # Completeness vs Contamination
  p_mag_quality <- ggplot(mag_stats, aes(x = Completeness, y = Contamination, color = Group4)) +
    geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group4_colors) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      title = "MAG Quality: Completeness vs Contamination",
      x = "Completeness (%)", y = "Contamination (%)"
    )
  print(p_mag_quality)
  ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "mag_quality_completeness_vs_contamination.pdf"), p_mag_quality, width = 7, height = 5)

  # Quality tier distribution
  p_mag_tier <- ggplot(mag_stats, aes(x = Group4, fill = Quality_Tier)) +
    geom_bar(position = "fill") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = "MAG Quality Tier Distribution", y = "Proportion", x = "") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  print(p_mag_tier)
  ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "mag_quality_tier_distribution.pdf"), p_mag_tier, width = 6, height = 5)
}
```

---

# 2. Virus Quality

```{r virus_quality}
# Look for CheckV output or use DeepPhage quality info
virus_lifestyle_path <- file.path(DATA_DIR, "04_Viruses/lifestyle")

if (dir.exists(virus_lifestyle_path)) {
  # Load DeepPhage data for quality metrics
  lifestyle_files <- list.files(virus_lifestyle_path, pattern = "_deephage.csv", full.names = TRUE)

  if (length(lifestyle_files) > 0) {
    virus_data <- lapply(lifestyle_files, function(f) {
      sample <- gsub("_deephage.csv", "", basename(f))
      df <- fread(f)
      df$Sample <- sample
      return(df)
    })
    virus_data <- rbindlist(virus_data, fill = TRUE)
    virus_data <- left_join(virus_data, metadata, by = c("Sample" = "SampleID"))

    # Length distribution by Group4
    if ("Length" %in% colnames(virus_data)) {
      p_virus_length <- ggplot(virus_data, aes(x = Group4, y = log10(Length), fill = Group4)) +
        geom_violin() +
        geom_boxplot(width = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = group4_colors) +
        theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
        labs(
          title = "Viral Contig Length Distribution",
          y = "Log10(Length)", x = ""
        )
      print(p_virus_length)
      ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "virus_length_distribution.pdf"), p_virus_length, width = 6, height = 5)
    }

    # Count per sample
    virus_counts <- virus_data %>%
      group_by(Sample, Group4) %>%
      summarise(
        n_viruses = n(),
        median_length = median(Length, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    knitr::kable(virus_counts, caption = "Virus Counts per Sample", digits = 0)
  }
} else {
  message("Virus lifestyle directory not found.")
}
```

---

# 3. Plasmid Quality

```{r plasmid_quality}
# Load plasmid host lineage data for counts
hotspot_dir <- file.path(DATA_DIR, "03_Plasmids/Host_lineage/HOTSPOT")

if (dir.exists(hotspot_dir)) {
  hotspot_files <- list.files(hotspot_dir, pattern = "host_lineage.tsv", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

  if (length(hotspot_files) > 0) {
    plasmid_data <- lapply(hotspot_files, function(f) {
      sample <- gsub("_results.*", "", basename(dirname(f)))
      df <- fread(f)
      df$Sample <- sample
      # Extract length from Contig name
      df$Length <- as.numeric(gsub(".*length_([0-9]+)_.*", "\\1", df$Contig))
      return(df)
    })
    plasmid_data <- rbindlist(plasmid_data, fill = TRUE)
    plasmid_data <- left_join(plasmid_data, metadata, by = c("Sample" = "SampleID"))

    # Plasmid length by Group4
    if ("Length" %in% colnames(plasmid_data) && sum(!is.na(plasmid_data$Length)) > 0) {
      print(ggplot(plasmid_data, aes(x = Group4, y = log10(Length), fill = Group4)) +
        geom_violin() +
        geom_boxplot(width = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = group4_colors) +
        theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
        labs(
          title = "Plasmid Length Distribution",
          y = "Log10(Length)", x = ""
        ))

      ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "plasmid_length_dist.pdf"), width = 6, height = 5)
    }

    # Plasmid counts per sample
    plasmid_counts <- plasmid_data %>%
      group_by(Sample, Group4) %>%
      summarise(
        n_plasmids = n(),
        median_length = median(Length, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    knitr::kable(plasmid_counts, caption = "Plasmid Counts per Sample", digits = 0)
  }
} else {
  message("Plasmid HOTSPOT directory not found.")
}
```

---

# 4. MAG Counts Summary

```{r counts_summary}
if (exists("mag_stats")) {
  # MAGs per sample
  mag_counts_per_sample <- mag_stats %>%
    group_by(SampleID, Group4) %>%
    summarise(
      n_MAGs = n(),
      n_HQ = sum(Quality_Tier == "HQ", na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_completeness = mean(Completeness, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  knitr::kable(mag_counts_per_sample,
    caption = "MAG Counts per Sample",
    digits = 1
  )
}
```

---

# 5. Summary Statistics

```{r summary_stats}
# Compile overall statistics
summary_stats <- data.frame(
  Entity = c("MAGs", "Viruses", "Plasmids"),
  Total = c(
    if (exists("mag_stats")) nrow(mag_stats) else NA,
    if (exists("virus_data")) nrow(virus_data) else NA,
    if (exists("plasmid_data")) nrow(plasmid_data) else NA
  )
)

knitr::kable(summary_stats, caption = "Total Entity Counts")
```

---

# Save Data

```{r save}
if (exists("mag_stats")) {
  saveRDS(mag_stats, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "data_objects", "mag_quality_stats.rds"))
}
if (exists("plasmid_data")) {
  saveRDS(plasmid_data, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "data_objects", "plasmid_quality.rds"))
}
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
